name: io.github.codegraph-ai/codegraph
description: Open-source code intelligence for AI agents. Builds a semantic graph of your codebase — functions, classes, imports, call chains — and exposes it through 31 MCP tools. Callers, callees, impact analysis, complexity metrics, unused code detection, AI context assembly, persistent memory, cross-project search. 15 languages via tree-sitter. Single Rust binary, local-first.
